description: A QA specialist must perform the final review of all production and quality data before releasing a batch of finished product for distribution.

nodes.task_description: Compile the complete batch record package, including the eBR and all QC test results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all required documentation for the batch.

nodes.task_description: Review the entire package to ensure there are no unresolved deviations or OOS results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that all deviations and investigations have been closed and the product meets all specifications.

nodes.task_description: Generate the Certificate of Analysis (CoA) for the batch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the official CoA document summarizing the release test results.

nodes.task_description: Perform the final electronic sign-off to release the batch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies their electronic signature, changing the batch status to 'Released'.
